subject: English
chapter: A House Is Not a Home
author: Zan Gaudioso

activities_projects.title: Main Characters
activities_projects.objective: Identify the important characters in the story
steps: Read the story carefully
List the main characters mentioned
Write one sentence about each character

activities_projects.title: Author’s Problem
activities_projects.objective: Understand the author's difficulties in the story
steps: Read the beginning of the lesson
Identify the problems faced by the author
Write 3–4 sentences describing them
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands the author's feelings and struggles

activities_projects.title: The Fire Incident
activities_projects.objective: Understand the main event of the story
steps: Find the part describing the fire
Write 4–5 sentences about what happened
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands the central incident of the story
activities_projects.evaluation: Clear explanation of the event (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Mother’s Bravery
steps: Read the part where the mother enters the burning house
Write 3 sentences explaining what she saved and why
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands the mother's courage and love

activities_projects.title: Author’s Feelings
activities_projects.objective: Understand the emotions of the author
steps: Identify the author’s feelings after the fire
Write 3–4 sentences describing them

activities_projects.title: Role of Schoolmates
steps: Read the part where students help the author
List three things they did to help him

activities_projects.title: The Cat’s Importance
activities_projects.objective: Understand the bond between the author and his cat
steps: Read the parts mentioning the cat
Write 3–4 sentences explaining why the cat was important to the author
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands emotional attachment in the story

activities_projects.title: Sequence of Events
steps: Identify four important events in the story
Write them in the correct order

activities_projects.title: Meaning of the Title
activities_projects.objective: Understand the significance of the title
steps: Think about the title 'A House Is Not a Home'
Write 3–4 sentences explaining its meaning

activities_projects.title: Moral of the Story
activities_projects.objective: Understand the lesson from the story
steps: Think about what the story teaches us
Write the moral in your own words
